description: Validated taxonomy for defect root cause entries in defects.jsonl. Claude Code must validate new bug entries against this tree and flag when a new subcategory is needed.

test-confirmed-code.description: Tests were written to confirm existing code rather than specify new behaviour. No user-visible breakage at time of discovery.

subcategories.written-after-implementation: Scenario or test written after the code existed, confirming the happy path rather than catching edge cases.
subcategories.happy-path-only: Test suite covered the success path but omitted error paths, async paths, or boundary conditions.
subcategories.mock-not-dom: Test mocked internal state rather than asserting observable DOM properties.

missing-scenario.description: No Gherkin scenario existed for the failing behaviour before the bug was introduced.

subcategories.dom-state-not-tested: Observable DOM state (element.value, textContent, classList) was not asserted — test checked mock or internal variable instead.
subcategories.async-path-not-tested: Async completion path (API callback, setTimeout, Promise resolution) had no scenario.
subcategories.error-path-not-tested: HTTP error status codes or network failure paths had no scenario.
subcategories.focus-state-not-tested: Browser focus / activeElement state was not exercised in any scenario.

defect-in-implementation.description: The implementation itself contained a logic error independent of test coverage.

subcategories.logic-error: Incorrect conditional, wrong operator, or bad data transformation.
subcategories.missing-guard: Missing null check, boundary guard, or defensive check that allowed an unsafe operation.
subcategories.wrong-scope: Variable or function referenced at the wrong scope level (global vs module vs closure).
subcategories.race-condition: Async operations executed in an order that the code did not handle.

process.description: Team process or workflow failure that allowed the defect to reach production.

subcategories.three-amigos-skipped: No collaborative scenario review (dev + test + product) before implementation.
subcategories.scenario-tested-mock-not-dom: Gherkin scenario passed because the mock had the fix already embedded — actual DOM behaviour was never exercised.
subcategories.no-pre-impl-checklist: Pre-implementation checklist (entry points, failure modes, async paths) was not completed before coding.
subcategories.gherkin-written-reactively: Gherkin scenarios were written after the bug was found, not before the feature was built.

validationRules.newSubcategoryThreshold: If a new bug's root cause does not fit any existing subcategory, flag it and add the new subcategory to this file before closing the bug.
validationRules.recurrenceFlag: Any subcategory appearing in 3 or more bugs is marked [recurring ▲] in the metrics report.
validationRules.falseGreenDefinition: A false green is a pipeline run that reported GREEN but a rod-caught bug was present and untested.
